headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on Fifth Third Bancorp, Raises Price Target to $60
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst John Pancari   maintains Fifth Third Bancorp (NYSE:FITB) with a In-Line and raises the price target from $58 to $60.

headline: 3 Unpopular Stocks with Open Questions
summary: Wall Street has issued downbeat forecasts for the stocks in this article. These predictions are rare - financial institutions typically hesitate to say bad things about a company because it can jeopardize their other revenue-generating business lines like M&A advisory.

headline: JP Morgan Maintains Overweight on Fifth Third Bancorp, Raises Price Target to $61
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Vivek Juneja   maintains Fifth Third Bancorp (NYSE:FITB) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $54.5 to $61.
